channel.title: CVE on simeononsecurity
channel.description: Recent content in CVE on simeononsecurity

item.title: CompTIA CySA+ (CS0-003): Vulnerability Management and Scanning
item.category: "CompTIA CySA+ Course" , "Vulnerability Management" , "Vulnerability Scanning" , "Risk Prioritization" , "Web Application Security" , "CVSS" , "Cybersecurity Analyst" , "Patch Management" , "Security Operations" , "Cybersecurity"
item.description: Master vulnerability management for the CompTIA CySA+ CS0-003 exam. Learn scanning, CVSS and CVE, prioritization, web application vulnerabilities, software composition analysis, and secure baselines.

item.title: CompTIA PenTest+ (PT0-003): Vulnerability Discovery and Analysis
item.category: "CompTIA PenTest+ Course" , "Penetration Testing" , "Vulnerability Discovery" , "Vulnerability Analysis" , "Ethical Hacking" , "Offensive Security" , "Physical Security" , "Security Testing" , "ICS Security" , "Cybersecurity"
item.description: Master vulnerability discovery and analysis for the CompTIA PenTest+ PT0-003 exam. Learn scan types, ICS assessment, validating results, physical security, and attack prioritization.

item.title: Mastering Cybersecurity: Learning about Latest CVEs and Threat Actors
item.category: "cybersecurity" , "CVEs" , "threat actors" , "vulnerability scanning" , "threat intelligence" , "information sharing" , "industry collaboration" , "security advisories" , "NVD" , "CVE" , "US-CERT" , "CERT" , "Mitre ATT&CK®" , "OpenCTI" , "NIST" , "CISA" , "cybersecurity vulnerabilities" , "emerging threats" , "proactive defense" , "automated vulnerability scanning" , "open-source intelligence" , "real-time threat intelligence" , "tactics and techniques of threat actors" , "OSINT techniques" , "CVE databases" , "security vendor advisories" , "security blogs" , "threat intelligence feeds" , "information sharing communities" , "government regulations"
item.description: Stay ahead of cyber threats by learning about the latest CVEs and threat actors through effective strategies and resources.
